queries.question: Give me the metrics corresponding to each financial analyst.
queries.sql: SELECT Metrics.metric_name  from Financial_Analysts_Metrics join Metrics on Financial_Analysts_Metrics.metric_id = Metrics.metric_id join Financial_Analysts on Financial_Analysts_Metrics.financial_analyst_id = Financial_Analysts.id   GROUP BY Financial_Analysts_Metrics.metric_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Financial_Analysts_Metrics.financial_analyst_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Financial_Analysts)

queries.question: Give me the metrics corresponding to each financial analyst.
queries.sql: select financial_analysts.name , metrics.metric_name from Financial_Analysts_Metrics join Metrics on Financial_Analysts_Metrics.metric_id = Metrics.metric_id join Financial_Analysts on Financial_Analysts_Metrics.financial_analyst_id = Financial_Analysts.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?metric_name WHERE {
  ?financial_analysts_metrics a :Financial_Analysts_Metrics .
  ?metrics a :Metrics .
  ?financial_analysts_metrics p:hasMetrics ?metrics .
  ?financial_analysts a :Financial_Analysts .
  ?financial_analysts_metrics p:hasFinancial_Analysts ?financial_analysts .
  ?financial_analysts p:name ?name .
  ?metrics p:metric_name ?metric_name .
}
